mustPass: Routes and section ids use kebab-case slugs.
Page set reflects food production needs with products and reseller discovery, not restaurant booking logic.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Copy stays factual and avoids invented certifications, volumes or retailer counts.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: restaurant-specific booking flow as a default for manufacturers
generic e-commerce filler without concrete product context
placeholder reseller entries or fake stockists
claims about certifications, allergens, origin or sustainability that the business has not provided
overstating direct online checkout if the site mainly supports inquiries or retailer-led sales
